name: PCI Password Complexity Requirements
description: Ensures passwords meet PCI DSS complexity requirements (min 7 chars, numeric and alpha) (PCI DSS 8.2.3)
query: SELECT id, system_name, min_length, require_numeric, require_alpha FROM password_policies WHERE cde_scope = true AND (min_length < 7 OR require_numeric = false OR require_alpha = false)
remediation: Configure password policies to require minimum 7 characters with both numeric and alphabetic characters.
